name: proc_creation_win_apt_unc2452_cmds
raw_query: any where ((process.command_line like~ ("*7z.exe a -v500m -mx9 -r0 -p*", "*7z.exe a -mx9 -r0 -p*")) and (process.command_line:"*.zip*" and process.command_line:"*.txt*")) or ((process.command_line like~ ("*7z.exe a -v500m -mx9 -r0 -p*", "*7z.exe a -mx9 -r0 -p*")) and (process.command_line:"*.zip*" and process.command_line:"*.log*")) or ((process.parent.command_line:"*wscript.exe*" and process.parent.command_line:"*.vbs*") and (process.command_line:"*rundll32.exe*" and process.command_line:"*C:\\Windows*" and process.command_line:"*.dll,Tk_*")) or (process.parent.executable:"*\\rundll32.exe" and (process.parent.command_line:"*C:\\Windows*" and process.parent.command_line:"*.dll*") and process.command_line:"*cmd.exe /C *") or (process.parent.executable:"*\\rundll32.exe" and process.executable:"*\\dllhost.exe" and process.command_line=="")
